script_text: Why is it important to read lots of different stories?
Different stories build different reading muscles!
Which is a great way to get better at reading?
A little every day adds up fast!
What should you do when a story gets tricky?
Growing readers ask questions when stuck!
A poem is a special kind of:
Poems are stories told with rhythm and feeling!
Why try stories that are a little harder than before?
A little stretch helps you grow!
